title: ranunculus litoricola
intro: Ranunculus litoricola, also known as sea buttercup, is a flowering plant species native to the coastal regions of Australia. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Ranunculus litoricola include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain and swelling, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
